data.body:
EPIC COMPLETE. All landed on main + all tickets closed:
 - 8d36 (Gerrit 644 -> main f943c7ef5): xdist parallelization + parallel=true coverage combine + leak-guard coverage-artifact fix + docs. CLOSED (verifier PASS).
 - 9ad9 (Gerrit 645 -> main 958e3366d): --durations=25 on both tiers of both workflows + .test_durations gitignore. CLOSED (verifier PASS).
 - bad4 (Gerrit 646 -> main 80a4a152b): pip caching on all 22 setup-python steps across 10 workflows; eval.yml manual cache converted to built-in. CLOSED (verifier PASS) — operator-attested cache-HIT observed on run 29290080654 ('Cache restored successfully', ~57MB).
 - epic ce0e: CLOSED (verifier PASS).
Landing: stacked relation chain; auto-lander via Autosubmit through heavy FFO churn (rebased ps1->ps2->ps3, re-CI each) until atomic-submit landed all three; kept alive by re-applying Autosubmit when the lander cleared it.
Discovered work filed: bug d30c (dutiable-shaded-honeyeater) — pre-existing live-Jira index-visibility flake in test_delete_permission_probe under live-group load; linked discovered_from ce0e; left open (out of scope).
Handoff: this session_log = 4307-c757-6e30-4f6e.
